metadata.title: Apu Garden Lodge — Rest, Nature & Experience
metadata.description: A boutique lodge in the Sacred Valley. Cozy rooms, lush gardens, and an astronomical telescope to see the sky like never before.

home.title: Apu Garden Lodge — Rest, Nature & Experience
home.description: A boutique lodge in the Sacred Valley, Cusco. Cozy rooms, lush gardens, and an astronomical telescope to see the sky like never before.

servicios.title: Services
servicios.description: Rooms, botanical breakfast, gardens, stargazing, transfers and a natural spa — everything included in your stay at Apu Garden Lodge.

novedad.title: New — Stargazing
novedad.description: Apu Garden Lodge added an astronomical telescope so you can see the Sacred Valley sky like never before.

footer.tagline: Rest, nature and experience among the mountains — your refuge to disconnect and look at the sky like never before.

single.description: For travelers seeking their own quiet retreat.

double.description: Designed for couples, with garden views.

home.heroText: A refuge among the mountains where time moves at your own pace — lush gardens, cozy rooms, and skies that look different from up here.
home.heroImageAlt: Green mountains of the Sacred Valley at sunrise, seen from Apu Garden Lodge
home.welcomeText: Every corner of Apu Garden Lodge is designed to slow you down: gardens that invite a quiet walk, warm rooms with views of nature, and a team that takes care of every detail so all you have to do is rest.
home.welcomeImageAlt: Cozy room at Apu Garden Lodge with botanical wallpaper
home.cardNovedadDesc: A telescope to see the sky differently.

servicios.title: Everything your stay includes
servicios.subtitle: From the room where you wake up to the sky you see at night — every service is designed so your only task is to rest.

breakfast.title: Botanical breakfast
breakfast.desc: Local produce, served among the gardens or in your room.

garden.title: Gardens and trails
garden.desc: Paths through native flora to wander without rushing.

stars.title: Stargazing
stars.desc: Our telescope, open every clear night.

wifi.title: Wifi across the lodge
wifi.desc: For those who only want to disconnect halfway.

transport.title: Transfers
transport.desc: We coordinate your arrival from Cusco or the valley.

spa.title: Natural spa
spa.desc: Treatments with local plants and infusions.

servicios.gardenText: Trails through native flora, shaded corners and stone benches — the garden at Apu Garden Lodge is as much a part of your stay as the room itself.
servicios.gardenImageAlt: Lush garden path at Apu Garden Lodge

novedad.title: See the sky like never before
novedad.subtitle: Apu Garden Lodge added an astronomical telescope so our guests can observe the sky of the Sacred Valley — one of the clearest and darkest in the country — with a level of detail you won't forget.
novedad.cta: Book your night under the stars
novedad.heroImageAlt: Observatory under the Milky Way, starry sky
novedad.experienceTitle: A sky that feels within reach
novedad.experienceText1: Free of light pollution and high up in the valley, the sky over Apu Garden Lodge opens up differently. Our team guides you every night to find planets, star clusters and the Milky Way through the lodge's telescope — an experience included for everyone staying with us.
novedad.experienceText2: Available every clear night. Just bundle up — we'll take care of the rest.
novedad.secondaryImageAlt: Starry sky with the Milky Way over a mountain silhouette
novedad.quote: “I had never seen so many stars at once.”
novedad.quoteAuthor: — A guest at Apu Garden Lodge

nosotros.title: The story behind the lodge
nosotros.originText1: Apu Garden Lodge was born from a simple idea: build a place where the nature of the Sacred Valley would be the protagonist, not just the backdrop. “Apu” — mountain spirit in Quechua — guides every corner of the lodge, from the gardens to the nights we spend looking at the sky.
nosotros.originText2: Today we keep growing with that same idea: less noise, more nature, and experiences that truly stay with you.
nosotros.cabinImageAlt: Mountain cabin among the forest, the origin of Apu Garden Lodge

nature.title: Nature first
nature.desc: Every decision at the lodge protects the environment around us.

rest.title: Real rest
rest.desc: Spaces designed to make time feel slower.

honest.title: Honest experience
honest.desc: No artificial luxury — just warmth, detail and genuine care.

nosotros.locationTitle: In the heart of the Sacred Valley
nosotros.locationText: A few minutes from the valley's towns and surrounded by mountains — close enough to explore, far enough to truly disconnect.

contacto.title: Let's talk about your next stay
contacto.subtitle: Write to us directly or check availability right here — whatever feels easiest.
